title: Styled Lecterns
description: Have you ever wished that lecterns came in all of the wood variants? Well, this datapack does exactly that!
body:
# Styled Lecterns
Have you ever wished that lecterns came in all of the wood variants? Well, this datapack does exactly that!

### What this datapack adds
- Oak Lectern (Block)
- Spruce Lectern (Block)
- Birch Lectern (Block)
- Acacia Lectern (Block)
- Jungle Lectern (Block)
- Dark Oak Lectern (Block)
- Mangrove Lectern (Block)
- Crimson Lectern (Block)
- Warped Lectern (Block)
